deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full compliance suite on an API 36 x86_64 emulator
deployment_support.floor_evidence: Build floor enforced by android.min_sdk_version; runtime floor validation is being added to the nightly matrix

deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full compliance suite on the current Xcode 26 simulator with both Metal and legacy OpenGL renderers
deployment_support.floor_evidence: The deployment target is compiled at 14.0; hosted CI does not currently run an iOS 14 simulator

deployment_support.architectures: Apple silicon and Intel through Mac Catalyst
deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full native compliance suite on macOS 15 using the Mac Catalyst target
deployment_support.floor_evidence: The macOS 10.15 and Catalyst 13.1 deployment floors are compiled; the oldest runtime is not available on hosted CI

deployment_support.declared_range: Current Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit engines
deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full compliance suite on Chromium; nightly lifecycle validation on Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit
deployment_support.floor_evidence: Exact engine versions come from the latest nightly run below; older browser floors are not claimed until they are exercised

deployment_support.declared_range: glibc desktops with GTK3; Alpine through the opt-in musl target
deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full native compliance suite on Ubuntu x64 and Ubuntu ARM64, including GTK, media, browser, storage, notifications, location, and 3D dependencies
deployment_support.floor_evidence: Release builds target an old glibc ABI; distro-floor runtime containers will be reported separately instead of inferring support from the build alone

deployment_support.declared_range: Windows 10 and newer; Windows 11 for Widgets Board packages
deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full native compliance suite on Windows 11 for x64 and ARM64
deployment_support.floor_evidence: The plain Win32 executable keeps optional newer APIs dynamic; a Windows 10 runtime job is required before narrowing the supported release floor

deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full compliance suite on the current Xcode 26 Apple Watch simulator
deployment_support.floor_evidence: The deployment target is compiled at 10.0; hosted CI does not currently run a watchOS 10 simulator

deployment_support.ci_evidence: Full compliance suite on the current Xcode 26 Apple TV simulator
deployment_support.floor_evidence: The deployment target is compiled at 13.0; hosted CI does not currently run a tvOS 13 simulator

benchmark.title: ParparVM common-workload benchmark
benchmark.configuration: Best of five interleaved runs, ThinLTO, versus a warmed Azul JDK 25
benchmark.explanation: Lower is faster. The same Java source and bit-identical checksums are used on both runtimes. This demonstrates native AOT performance against a mature optimizing JVM; it is not presented as a Flutter comparison.

comparative_metrics.publication_rule: Matched release applications, cold process start, multiple interleaved runs on the same host
Complete distributable application, including framework/runtime files required on a clean machine
Same screen and idle interval, measured by the operating system after first frame
Equivalent Java and Dart AOT implementations with deterministic checksums and interleaved runs
